title: Fusion Pack
description: A modpack aimed for friend groups whit different preferences
body:
This modpack is still in Beta. If you encounter any issues or bugs contact me at: su2portfp@outlook.com Also any suggestions or advice on how to make this modpack better in any way would be much appreciated.

Originally I made this pack for a group of friends. Each one of them wanted a different mod/feature, so I created this modpack which includes all of them. 

In this modpack I included a lot of tech mods, a few new combat weapons(guns and melee), other planets to explore, more structures, more varied terrain generation and some qol mods. You can see the full list in each version dependencies list.
If any of these features sound appealing to you, then this might be the right modpack for you to play and have fun whit.

To run this modpack, you will need to allocate at least 4gb of Ram( keep in mind that by defeault, in a new world, 1.5-2gb of ram are taken, so if you play the same world for a long time or host a server, then you might need to increase the allocation to 6-8gb). For the processor, a dual core is enough to experience this modpack, but it might take a while to load the game and the world. A 4 core processor or better is recommended.

Current issues/bugs:
- Ore generation is not really balanced
- Snow doesn't acumullate on stairs and slabs( even tough is a minecraft vanilla bug, I plan to fix it)
- Foliage generates in the air, especially where there are lakes
